mission.title: opentofu: Enable Variables in backend config block
mission.description: Enable Variables in backend config block. Requested by 61+ users.

steps.title: Check current opentofu deployment
steps.description:
Verify your opentofu version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu
helm list -n opentofu 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working opentofu installation.

steps.title: Review opentofu configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant opentofu configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu
kubectl get configmap -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentofu
```
### OpenTF Version

```shell
OpenTF v1.6.0-dev
on darwin_amd64
```

### Use Cases

Currently, if I have OpenTF configuration, I would like to use a different backend configuration when I run OpenTF for different stages, for example prod and dev AWS

steps.title: Apply the fix for Enable Variables in backend config block
steps.description:
Implements RFC #1042 [Static Evaluation](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/blob/main/rfc/20240513-static-evaluation.md)

This is a work in progress that builds on top of my prototyping over the past 6 months.

Note: Input variable handing is a bit wonky as it's spread across a bunch of
```yaml
terraform {
  backend "s3" {
    bucket  = "terraform-state-bucket"
    key     = "terraform.tfstate"
    region  = "us-east-1"
    encrypt = true
    access_key = "{{ AWS_S3_BACKEND_ACCESS_KEY }}"
    secret_key = "{{ AWS_S3_BACKEND_SECRET_KEY }}"
  }
}
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu
kubectl get events -n opentofu --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Enable Variables in backend config block" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
⚠️ Note: This resolution was work-in-progress at the time of PR submission. Implements RFC #1042 [Static Evaluation](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/blob/main/rfc/20240513-static-evaluation.md)

This is a work in progress that builds on top of my prototyping over the past 6 months.

Note: Input variable handing is a bit wonky as it's spread across a bunch of different packages.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with opentofu installed or the issue environment reproducible.
